info.title: LightBDD.ScenarioSync.Cli
info.description:
ScenarioSync and LightBDD framework is a good alternative to SpecSync and SpecFlow framework.
            ScenarioSync import scenario to Azure DevOps, integrates the BDD process with Azure DevOps by connecting and synchronizing the LightBDD scenarios with Test Cases.
            ScenarioSync use LightBDD labels with "Relations:" metadata to assign Scenarios to Related Work Items in Azure DevOps.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: A cli tool for automatically associate automated tests with test cases.

commands.name: init
commands.description: This command will create a ScenarioSync configuration file ./scenariosync.json.user

commands.description: Import scenarios to Azure Devops Test Suite.

commands.name: clean
commands.description: Clean imported scenarios in Azure Devops.
